dashboard.savedOffline: Saved offline. Will sync when you reconnect.

calendar.selectionHintTouch: Tap a day to edit, drag to select a range, or long-press to pick individual days.
calendar.selectionHintDesktop: Click a day to edit, drag to select a range, or {modifier}-click to pick individual days.
calendar.attendanceSaved: Attendance saved for {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}!
calendar.savedOffline: Saved {count, plural, one {# entry} other {# entries}} offline. Will sync when you reconnect.
calendar.cleared: Cleared {count, plural, one {# entry} other {# entries}}

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.noDataHint: Try selecting a different time period or log some attendance first.

settings.title: Settings
settings.noTransportMethods: No transport methods configured. Add methods like "Own Car", "Bike", "Public Transport".
settings.regionHelp: Used for calculating region-specific public holidays
settings.weekStartHelp: First day of the week in the calendar view
settings.name: Name
settings.transportPlaceholder: e.g., Own Car, Bike, Public Transport
settings.deleteTransportConfirm: Delete this transport method? Locations using it will have their transport cleared.
settings.deleteLocationConfirm: Delete this location? Attendance records using it will keep their data but lose the location reference.

export.title: Export & Import
export.csvFormat: CSV format: Date, Type, Transport, Notes
export.pdfFormat: PDF format: Formatted table with monthly summaries
export.exportUseCase: Exports may be useful for personal record-keeping (e.g. tax filings)
export.dropZone: Drop a CSV file here or click to browse
export.dropZoneHint: Use the same format as the exported CSV
export.rowsReady: {count, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}} ready to import
export.importRows: Import {count, plural, one {# Row} other {# Rows}}
export.csvHeaders: CSV must have headers: Date, Type, Location, Transport, Distance (km), Notes
export.csvOverwrite: Dates with existing entries will be updated (overwritten)
export.csvMatch: Location and transport names are matched to your existing entries
export.csvTemplate: Export your data first to get a compatible CSV template
export.selectDates: Please select both start and end dates
export.csvMinRows: CSV file must have a header row and at least one data row
export.csvInvalidType: Row {row}: Invalid type "{type}" (expected: office, home, off, holiday, sick)

signin.tagline: Track your office attendance, commute, and work location

offline.youAreOffline: You are offline. Changes will sync when you reconnect.

offline.synced: Synced {count, plural, one {# offline entry} other {# offline entries}}
offline.failedToSync: {count, plural, one {# entry} other {# entries}} failed to sync

reminders.unsupported: Notifications are not supported in this browser.
reminders.permissionHint: Allow notifications to receive attendance reminders
reminders.blockedHint: Please enable notifications in your browser settings
reminders.workDaysHint: Respects your configured work days in settings below
reminders.testFailed: Failed to send notification. Check browser and system notification settings.
reminders.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Enable in browser settings.
